diagrams.title: Product Life Cycle Stages with Environmental Impact
diagrams.description: A horizontal flowchart showing five stages: Requirements & Design → Development → Deployment → Use → Retirement, with a bar overlay showing environmental impact percentage at each stage (Use being 60-90%).
elements: Key sustainability focus areas at each stage
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where environmental impact concentrates and guide sustainability efforts

diagrams.title: Carbon Footprint Calculation Model
diagrams.description: A formula diagram showing: Carbon Footprint = Energy Consumption (kWh) × Carbon Intensity Factor (kg CO2/kWh), with arrows showing factors that reduce each component.
diagrams.purpose: Help students understand how to calculate and reduce software carbon footprint

diagrams.title: Green IT Strategy Pyramid
diagrams.description: A pyramid diagram with three levels: Base (Infrastructure - virtualization, cloud), Middle (Application - efficient code, caching), Top (User Behavior - awareness, optimization), representing layered sustainability approach.
diagrams.purpose: Show holistic approach to Green IT implementation across different organizational levels
